name: Pension plan and 80CCC deduction
description: User asks about tax benefits on pension plan under 80CCC

input.message: I pay ₹60,000 per year to LIC Jeevan Akshay pension plan and also have PPF of ₹1 lakh. What is my 80CCC and 80C deduction? My income is ₹18 lakhs.

notes: 80CCC is within the ₹1.5L 80C limit, not additional. PPF ₹1L + Pension ₹60K = ₹1.6L, but capped at ₹1.5L. Full ₹1.5L deductible. At 20% bracket (₹15-20L slab): tax saving ~₹30K.
